creator: fenner@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Brian, 

Because of the renaming, the port update is a two-step process. 
The first step got done and the second hasn't yet.  The PR with your 
original submission is still open, so it won't get lost.  Sorry that 
it's taking so long, but we have only a limited set of port committers.
